summary: Frontend-only landing page tested end-to-end on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. All 13 requested features verified PASS with zero console errors and zero page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: FooterSection.jsx line 50 uses 'group-hover:text-white' but parent <a> does not have 'group' class — the icon color hover state will not trigger. Not functional bug, just dead Tailwind class.

Minor: Header NAV_ITEMS data-testid uses 'nav-link-início' with diacritic (í). Works in selectors but selectors with special chars can be fragile across tooling. Consider slugifying without diacritics.
Code quality: All components are well-structured, use data-testid consistently, and follow proper React patterns. No file exceeds 200 lines.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is fully static (no backend). All 13 acceptance criteria from review_request verified: page load, header (logo/nav/CTA), mobile hamburger toggle (open & close), hero (title/subtitle/2 CTAs/image/floating cards), hero CTA scrolls exactly to #categorias (delta=0px), 6 category cards (alimentacao/higiene/conforto/diversao/viagens/saude), 4 product cards with affiliate-link-* testids, 3 article cards, newsletter form shows 'Inscrito!' confirmation after submit, footer with brand/3 link columns/4 social icons/affiliate disclaimer/copyright year (2026). Zero console errors during entire test run.
